agent.description: Logical agent identity for sidecar correlation (X-DefenseClaw-Agent-Id)

id.description: Stable logical agent id; overrides the persisted extension id when set

sidecarPort.description: Port for the DefenseClaw Go sidecar REST API

mode.description: Guardrail mode: observe (log only) or action (block threats)

awsHttp1Shim.description: Amazon Bedrock: pi-ai uses HTTP/2 by default, which bypasses the guardrail proxy. When enabled, sets AWS_BEDROCK_FORCE_HTTP1=1 (pi-ai) and applies a Smithy fallback patch. auto = on only if OpenClaw model config references Bedrock; on = always; off = never.
